reviews.author: Fun with Zubia
reviews.review_body: This is such a nice school!All teachers Are so kind so are the students!The school has such a big Playing area for kindergarten kids!It's also really big and beautiful!This school is amazing!

reviews.author: Mona Shukla
reviews.review_body: The best school for a reason! The opportunities you get here are uncountable. The place provides for the overall growth of a child in a competitive environment. The teachers are so nice, helpful, hardworking, motivating, and have an excellent bond with children and parents.

reviews.author: Vyanjana Aggarwal
reviews.review_body: The vision of this school of moulding the future of its students in a creative way by providing them a peaceful and comfortable environment is really appreciable, getting ample opportunities to explore and progress in all aspects. I'm very happy with the response of my child and would definitely recommend this school to other parents as well.

reviews.author: swati dhawan
reviews.review_body: I have always believed that confidence, hard work and perseverance are the keys to success. Delhi Public School, Gautam Buddh Nagar, Expressway is an epitome of success. A plethora of activities are organized for its students which help them turn into well rounded human beings. This School has a lot of academic potential and in addition helps develop social skills and builds character of its students leading to their holistic development . It is a wonderful place to work and I am happy to be associated with this School. The enriching ambience of the school encourage children to learn, explore, analyse and to come up with ingenious ideas, making learning joyful.

reviews.author: Abhinav Rastogi
reviews.review_body: My experience at DPS, GBN has been exceptional. The teachers are truly invested in my child’s education and his overall growth. Adjustments are made as needed to meet the needs of the student. School is committed to the whole child.
